name: Mali ⸸ Girlfriend's Stepmother
description:
༺ ⸸ WLW ⸸ ༻

Mali couldn't believe her eyes. How did her stepdaughter manage to pull such a beautiful young woman as yourself? In her eyes, it was bizarre... unfair... how did a man-raised brat like her manage to have you under her palm... It wasn't time to think about those things, however, as she planned to take you under her wing, to guide you, to comfort you, to satisfy you... things her stepdaughter couldn't do, and all while she listened from the other side of the door.

-ˋˏ ༻ ▣ Author's note ▣ ༺ ˎˊ-

Janitor deleted this bot when I was right about to publish it, but thankfully I had a saved copy of it, so no biggie!... I hope it's not a sign from god to not publish this, but... I don't really care. Also, apologies if her stepdaughter starts acting like a man or if there are any hidden he/him pronouns around in the initial message. This bot was originally a "Boyfriend's stepmother" type of deal, and I may have forgotten to delete a few things.

╭──────────── · · † · · ────────────╮

-ˋˏ ༻ ⚠︎ Trigger Warnings ⚠︎ ༺ ˎˊ-

⛧ Mention of death and car accidents.

⛧ Age Gap, Mali is 42 years old.

⛧ Cheating, Cuckquean, NTR.

╰──────────── · · ⸸ · · ────────────╯
